calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Steven Marchbanks, Esq. 619-459-7363 Premiere Legal Canter APC for Plaintiff.
Ryan Kay, Esq. (949) 777-6032 ERSKINE LAW, APC for Defendant General Motors

Hearing is held. The court announces its leaning to grant in part (57k) and deny in part (multiplier 1.5) Both sides present argments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SELENA CISNEROZ' Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs.

Taken Under Submission. Both sides to submit a proposed order in conformity with the court's tentative, comply with CRC 3.1312 and drop a hard copy in Dept. 302's inbox for the Court's review.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/REQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Compliance And Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC.'s Motion For Compliance And Sanctions.

Defendant General Motors, LLC's Motion for Compliance and Sanctions is OFF CALENDAR.

On November 14, 2025, Defendant filed a notice of withdrawal of the motion. Thus, the court orders the motion OFF CALENDAR.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Set For Trial On Jul-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
